title: ExtraStar 13A Electrical Extension Reel, 4 Sockets Cable Reel with Winding Handle 1100W/3120W Thermal Cut Out, Heavy-Duty Extension Lead with 5 Metre Cord - Green
features: ►Multi-Function: This 13A extension cable reel with total power supply up to 3120W, enables you to power up 4 appliances simultaneously. Ideal for using at home, entertainment centers and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected. NOTE: NOT FOR WET AND RAINY CONDITIONS!

►Sturdy and Durable: The extension cable lead has a thermal cut-out, which protect against over-voltage, over-current, short-circuiting, overload, offering more safety for the household electric appliances and a peaceful mind while charging.

►Compact and Easy to Storage: The winding handle makes it easy to storage and lift. With 5M extension cable, the open reel extension lead with winding handle is perfect to use when you require a long cable extension lead in the office or at home.

►Safety Guarantee: UKCA,CE, BSI(KM 69196) approved. We adopt anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers.
►What You Get: ExtraStar 13A 4 Sockets Electrical Extension Cable Reel with 5M Extension Cord and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Brand: ExtraStar Port: 4 Ports Cable Length: 5M Voltage: 13A/240V~ Max. Load: 1100W(cable winded) 3120W(fully extended) Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² ExtraStar 13A Four Sockets Cassette Cable Reel Extension Lead with Thermal Cut Out Cords Reel with 5 Metres Extension Cable With a cassette style design, this 4 way 5M cable reel with thermal cut out from ExtraStar is a professional choice for portable power supply. 13A cords reel comes with total power supply up to 3120W(when fully extended), enables you to power up 4 appliances simultaneously. Safety thermal cut-out prevents the cable from overheating when fully reeled. Lightweight and compact design is easy for transportation and storage. Perfect for using around the home, garden or office. For indoor use only, not for wet conditions! Do not exceed total maximum load! Keep it away from children! Key Features Security Shutter Every socket with 75N safety shutter in it, which equivalent to the force of picking up a 7.5kg object, can prevent children from inserting their fingers and causing electric shock. Thermal Cut Out With safety thermal cut-out, which enable to prevent risk of overheating due to temperature rise when fully reeled, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers. Sturdy and Reliable H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² fused copper wire is thick and strong, will not get loosen and deformation easily. Good electrical conductivity will reduce heat and extend life span.
